abilities.name: Duality Shield
abilities.desc: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Paradox of Duality
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Supreme Loyalty (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test.

abilities.name: Suppression Volley
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while unit is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.desc:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.name: Breach and Clear
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: DS8 Support Turret
abilities.desc:
In your Movement phase, if this unit Remains Stationary, until the start of your next turn, its Shas’ui model is equipped with the support turret weapon.

Designer’s Note: Place a Support Turret token next to this unit to remind you.

abilities.name: Fieldcraft
abilities.desc: At the end of the your Command phase, if this unit within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Bodyguard
abilities.desc: If this unit has a Starting Strength of 20, you can attach up to two Leader units to it instead of one, provided those Leaders are not duplicates (e.g. you cannot attach two WAR SHAPERS to this unit). If you do, and this unit is destroyed, the Leader units attached to it become separate units with their original Starting Strengths.

abilities.name: Kroot Packmates
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent's Shooting phase, when a friendly KROOT INFANTRY unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, that unit with this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Turbo-jets
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Crisis Bodyguard
abilities.desc: If a CHARACTER unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a CRISIS FIREKNIFE BATTLESUIT unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

abilities.name: Forward Observers
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in a Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Homing Beacon
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and not within 9" of any enemy units.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.*

abilities.name: Target Uploaded
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of that attack by 1 and that attack has the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

abilities.name: Grav-inhibitor Drone
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

abilities.name: Pulse Accelerator Drone
abilities.desc: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of pulse carbines equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Recon Drone
abilities.desc: The bearer is equipped with 1 drone burst cannon and the bearer’s unit has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Piranha
abilities.desc: At the end of your Movement phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of this unit; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Airborne Agility
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Oversight Drone
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, when the bearer’s unit is selected to shoot, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

Designer’s Note: Place an Oversight Drone token next to the bearer, removing it once this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Loping Pounce
abilities.desc: At the start of your Command phase, if this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly KROOT INFANTRY units, then until the end of the turn, this unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Hunting Hounds
abilities.desc: While this unit is within 12" of one or more friendly KROOT CHARACTER models, the Objective Control characteristic of models in this unit is 1.

abilities.name: Advanced Armour
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Bounty Hunters
abilities.desc: At the start of the battle, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that unit, that attack has the [LETHAL HITS] and [PRECISION] abilities.

abilities.name: Pech'ra
abilities.desc: Ranged weapons equipped by the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: High-intensity Markerlights
abilities.desc: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Aerial Disengagement
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

abilities.name: Drone Escort
abilities.desc: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

abilities.name: Thunderous Pounce
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Knarloc beak and talons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

abilities.name: Photon Casters
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy INFANTRY unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Sunforge
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a **^^Monster^^** or **^^Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
abilities.desc: This unit has a 4+ Invulnerable Save

abilities.name: Fireknife
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit that is at its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Weapon Support System
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Starscythe
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack (excluding attacks that target MONSTERS and VEHICLES), improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Battlesuit Support System
abilities.desc: The unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Kroot Linebreakers
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If one or more enemy models are destroyed as a result of these mortal wounds, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Agile Combatant
abilities.desc: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Hero of the Empire (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Advanced Guardian Drone
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack targets the bearer, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Command-link Drone (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of the bearer, each time you select that unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Supreme Commander
abilities.desc: If this model is in your army, it must be your WARLORD.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- CRISIS SUNFORGE BATTLESUITS
- CRISIS FIREKNIFE BATTLESUITS
- CRISIS STARSCYTHE BATTLESUITS

abilities.name: Way of the Short Blade
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack that targets an enemy unit within 9", add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Puretide's Teachings
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:

abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.desc:

- CRISIS STARSCYTHE BATTLESUITS

abilities.name: Enforcer Commander
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- CRISIS SUNFORGE BATTLESUITS

- CRISIS STARSCYTHE BATTLESUITS

abilities.name: Coldstar Commander
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 12" and ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- BREACHER TEAM
- STRIKE TEAM

abilities.name: Volley Fire
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

abilities.name: Crack Shot
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, on a Critical Wound, that attack has an Armour Penetration characteristic of -3.

abilities.name: Coordinated Leadership
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- BREACHER TEAM
- STRIKE TEAM

abilities.name: Failure Is Not an Option
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

abilities.name: Hover Drone
abilities.desc: The bearer can FLY and has a Move characteristic of 10".

abilities.name: Inspirational Defiance
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following units:
- BREACHER TEAM
- KROOT CARNIVORES
- STRIKE TEAM

abilities.name: Martial Warrior
abilities.desc:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to be active while resolving those attacks:
- Direct Grace: Fidelity has the [PRECISION] ability.
- Forceful Strike: Fidelity has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.
- Whirling Stance: Fidelity has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead of [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

abilities.name: Structural Analyser
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Jammer Array
abilities.desc: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- PATHFINDER TEAM

abilities.name: Armour Hunter
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: XV02 Pilot Battlesuit
abilities.desc: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly HAMMERHEAD GUNSHIP unit within 12". Until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Homing Beacon
abilities.desc:
Once per battle, you can use the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP. The target must be set up within 3" of the bearer’s unit and not within 9" of any enemy units.
**Designer’s Note:** *Place a Homing Beacon token next to this unit, removing it once this ability is used.*

abilities.name: Stealth Drones
abilities.desc:
Twice per battle, after an attack has been allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

Designer’s Note: Place two Stealth Drone tokens next to the unit, removing one each time this ability has been used.

abilities.name: Battlesuit Support System
abilities.desc: The bearer is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back but it loses the SMOKE keyword.

abilities.name: Precise Targeting
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a Spotted unit, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

units.name: Pathfinders w/ pulse carbine and grenade launcher

abilities.name: Grav-inhibitor Drone
abilities.desc: Each time an enemy unit selects the bearer's unit as the target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

abilities.name: Pulse Accelerator Drone
abilities.desc: Add 6" to the Range characteristic of pulse carbines equipped by models in the bearer’s unit.

abilities.name: Recon Drone
abilities.desc: The bearer is equipped with 1 drone burst cannon and the bearer’s unit has the Infiltrators ability.

abilities.name: Nova Charge
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this unit is selected to shoot in your Shooting phase, select one ranged weapon equipped by this model. Until the end of the phase, that weapon has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Armour Hunter
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Velocity Tracker
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack with a ranged weapon that targets a unit that can FLY, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Rapid Deployment
abilities.desc: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally in the remainder of the turn.

abilities.name: Ground Strike Fighter
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets an enemy unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Pulse Bombs
abilities.desc: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Tidewall Defence Platform
abilities.desc: If equipped with a Tidewall defence platform, this FORTIFICATION has a Wounds characteristic of 15.

abilities.name: Droneport
abilities.desc: Each time this FORTIFICATION is selected to shoot, its drone defenders weapon will target and resolve attacks against every enemy unit that is an eligible target to this FORTIFICATION.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-5 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, subtract 3 from this models Objective Control characteristic, and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Heavy Walker
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Support System
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titan-killer
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a TITANIC or TOWERING unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Nova Shielding
abilities.desc: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Nova Burst
abilities.desc: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

abilities.name: Coordinated Strike
abilities.desc: While this model is a Guided unit, each time it makes an attack that targets its Spotted unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-10 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Super-Heavy Walker
abilities.desc: Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **^^Titanic^^** models) and terrain features that are 4" or less in height as if they were not there.

abilities.name: Agile Dogfighter
abilities.desc: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Strafing Run
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks that cannot FLY. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Transport bay
abilities.desc: The bearer has the TRANSPORT keyword and has a transport capacity of 12 TACTICAL DRONES models.

abilities.name: Titan Hunter
abilities.desc: This model’s twin heavy rail cannon and seeker missiles have the [ANTI-TITANIC 3+] ability while targeting a unit within half range.

abilities.name: Aggressive Deployment
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this TRANSPORT this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Air Caste Colossus
abilities.desc: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-20 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Jet Pack Insertion
abilities.desc: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this TRANSPORT can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-9 Wounds Remaining
abilities.desc: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Loping Stride
abilities.desc: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Baggage Harness (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly KROOT unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Outflank
abilities.desc: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)
abilities.desc: While a friendly T'AU EMPIRE unit is within 6" of this FORTIFICATION, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Reinforced Cover
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Sentinel Protocols
abilities.desc: Each time you select this FORTIFICATION for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Kroot Ambush
abilities.desc: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model's unit and one other friendly KROOT unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Trail Finding
abilities.desc: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model's unit, if this model's unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

abilities.desc:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
- KROOT CARNIVORES
- KROOT FARSTALKERS

abilities.name: Root of Honour
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly KROOT unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

abilities.name: War Leader
abilities.desc: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

- KROOT FARSTALKERS

abilities.name: Ritual Butchery
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Rites of Feasting
abilities.desc: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel Not Pain 6+ ability. If that unit destroys one or more enemy units in the Fight phase, unit the end of the battle, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

abilities.name: Fire and Fade
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this model is not eligible to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Advanced Scouting
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that hits an enemy unit, until the end of the turn, each time another KROOT model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
